overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban plaza in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a covered outdoor dining area with purple neon signage to an open tree-lined plaza at night. The camera moves steadily forward past food stalls and pedestrians in a high-density commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining plaza with neon signage

events.description: pedestrian in red shirt passes close by on the left side of the frame
approaching the food stall area with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the food vendors and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'DYNALAB' on the building wall
food vendor stall with purple neon signage and menu displays
large white patio umbrellas over outdoor dining tables with purple lighting
multi-level concrete building structure providing overhead cover

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial plaza beneath a concrete overhang, passing a large DYNALAB billboard on the right. The path leads toward a food stall with purple neon signage and white patio umbrellas. A pedestrian in a red shirt walks past on the left as the camera approaches the dining area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with tree-lined walkway

events.description: exiting the covered dining area into the open plaza with visible trees and sky
entering more populated area of the plaza with multiple pedestrians visible in distance

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza into the more open area, turning slightly left toward the tree-lined path

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue outfit walking away from camera toward the tree line

entered.detail: tall trees lining the edge of the plaza visible against the night sky
illuminated commercial buildings visible through the trees in the background
tall lamp posts providing ambient lighting along the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered dining area into an open urban plaza with a tree-lined walkway on the left. The DYNALAB billboard and food stalls fall behind as the scene opens up to reveal distant buildings and street lights. A pedestrian in blue walks ahead toward the trees as the camera continues forward into the wider plaza space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered commercial corridor into an expansive, open-air urban plaza at night. It begins beneath a heavy concrete overhang, passing a large DYNALAB billboard and a pedestrian in a red shirt while heading toward a food stall illuminated by purple neon signage and white patio umbrellas. As the camera emerges from this covered dining area, the enclosed architecture gives way to a wider vista where the billboards and stalls recede into the background. The scene then opens up to reveal a tree-lined walkway on the left and distant city lights, following a pedestrian in blue who walks ahead into the deepening space of the plaza.
